---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## ❓ Question

What would you like to know?

## 🔍 Context

Provide some context about your question:

- What are you trying to achieve?
- What have you tried so far?
- What specific part of the project are you asking about?

## 📋 Additional Information

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g. 3.11.0]
- **Application version**: [e.g. 1.2.0]

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your question.

## 🔗 Related Documentation

Have you checked:
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Existing issues
- [ ] Project documentation

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing questions before creating this one
- [ ] I have provided clear context about my question
- [ ] I have included relevant system information
- [ ] I have checked existing documentation
